model_patch.entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/Contac:
diff --git a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
index a289708..41e616d 100644
--- a/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
+++ b/entry/src/main/ets/pages/contacts/ContactList.ets
@@ -257,7 +257,7 @@ struct ContactContent {
                     }
                   }
                 }
-              }, (item:ContactListShowInfo) => JSON.stringify(item))
+              }, (item:ContactListShowInfo) => JSON.stringify(item), 5)
             }
             .width('100%')
             .height('100%')

The fix adds `cachedCount: 5` as the fourth parameter to the LazyForEach at line 260 (originally line 225 in the warning, but the actual closing is at line 260). This sets an appropriate cache count for performance optimization when using LazyForEach in grid layouts, which resolves the `@performance/hp-arkui-set-cache-count-for-lazyforeach-grid` warning.
